title: Mowzie's Cataclysm
description: Mowzie's Cataclysm adds features between Mowzie's Mobs and Cataclysm to fill in gaps
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d169cf3ed1e0aed2a06f937e4c787b5fc7690a07.png)

## **Description:**

Mowzie's Cataclysm is a compatability mod between Cataclysm and Mowzie's Mobs that aims to better connect the mods with new content.

Currently this mod adds 3 new eyes to find each of the Mowzie's Mobs bosses, other content like boss music discs are planned as well!

This mod is still new and being developed, so feedback and suggestions are very much appreciated!

## **Curseforge Page:**
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-cataclysm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-cataclysm)
